reviews.title: Garbage.
reviews.text: This is without a doubt the most disappointing thing I have purchased on amazon. The picture in the display makes it look like the mouse has a little bit of sparkle and a fuchsia lip stamp on it. It’s the cheapest crap I have ever seen. The picture on the mouse looks like it was blown up way to large to fit on the mouse. It feels like cheap plastic and for $20 I really could have bought something much nicer. I am not happy with this at all. It’s not worth one star. Update!!! The clickers are backwards so now when I go to select something it opens up the small menu the way it would if you right click. This is completely trash. So disappointing.

reviews.title: Liked it until .....
reviews.text:
As I began typing, I liked the smooth, quite feel BUT quickly discovered that this keyboard does NOT have a 'Print Screen' key, which is vital when working. DO NOT Buy this if you need it for work. As you can see in the picture provided, the 'F11' key is NOT labeled.
F11 toggles from Full Screen back to regular screen. The first 4 keys at the top of the number key pad are TOTALLY UNNECESSARY.
1st key) Same function as Ctrl+C (Copy)
2nd key) Does Absolutely Nothing!
3rd key) Same function as Ctrl+V, (Paste)
4th key) Same function as Ctrl+X (Cut)
Had this keyboard followed the SAME FORMAT
The keyboard is overpriced to be missing a vital function as Print Screen Key.

reviews.title: Works well, when it connects.  Update:  It loses connection WAY too much
reviews.text:
I like the mouse. Excellent value for money, except for one very annoying flaw. It is constantly disconnecting the bluetooth connection from my new Macbook Pro. It's pretty annoying.

After what feels like only a few minutes of idle time, the mouse bluetoothe disconnects. Then when I move it nothing happens for a couple seconds. The finally, it connects and my laptop tells me the mouse is back, and it works perfectly... until the next time it is idle.

I have use other low cost brands as well as my Apple Magic Mouse (which I don't use as I prefer a track wheel). I have not had any issues with the Bluetooth on those, only this one...

If it were not for the disconnect issue I would rate the mouse a 5 star. Otherwise, I give it a 3. I am still using it for now, but will find a better one...

UPDATE: Okay, I find that I am CONSTANTLY drustrated that this mouse loses connection with my laptop. PITA. Not worth using at any price.

reviews.title: Junk
reviews.text: Even after swapping out the battery, and making sure it’s in pairing mode, it refuses to pair with any device I’ve tried and doesn’t show up in my Bluetooth menu as a visible device. It very briefly showed up on my Macbook as a keyboard, but never as a mouse, and now it won’t even do that. Save your money and get a mouse that will work.

reviews.title: It works great! But not for long!
reviews.text:
Came a day early, put two AAA batteries in, put the USB in the laptop, and away we go.

It works great.

Update: It didn't work for long. It starts out with the mouse going to sleep all on it's own, and then it gets worst (you wouldn't think it possible, would you). I left the laptop and mouse on while I ran to the store, when I came back it was working VERY intermittent (very jerky) so I opened it thinking maybe my batteries weren't all that good.

What did I find? One of the batteries was so hot I couldn't touch it. I'm surprised it didn't catch on fire.

I should have known better than to buy some Chinese garbage. Into the trash it went.

Don't buy this, it's a waste of good money.

title: LED Wireless Mouse, Wireless Mouse for Desktop Computerr,Wireless Mouse for MacBook pro/air/pc/Laptop,,2.4G Portable USB Optical Wireless Computer Mice with USB Receiver and Type C Adapter (Black)
description: 7 Colorful LED breathing light change alternately, soothing light lights up the mouse in dark, adds more fun to the life. Note: It can't be set to one specific color. How to use it? * Charge the mouse for about 2 hours before using it for the first time. 1. Take the dongle out, which is stored at the bottom of the mouse. 2. Insert the dongle into the USB port of your device, and open the mouse switch (at the bottom of the mouse). 3. Allow a few seconds for installing, no action needed, just wait. Then you can use it. Note: If your computer is Type-C port, please insert the USB-C to USB receiver into the Type-c port of the device first, then insert the USB receiver into the USB-C to USB receiver. Turn on the power switch and the mouse will work. Tips: The mouse cursor will move slowly or stop moving when the mouse is low battery. Please charge it on time. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.
features: 2020 Latest Upgrade LED Design】The upgraded version mouse with the LED lights adds more fun to the boring office life. The bottom of the mouse has a switch, you can switch lights freely. Low-key or sparkle, switch in one second, suitable for any occasion.

【Plug and Play】No need to install any driver, just plug the USB receiver into your laptop will the mouse start to serve. 2.4GHz wireless technology provides powerful and reliable connection, effective up to 10 meters of range. Advanced optical tracking technology with fast click and responsiveness. 3-Level adjustable DPI (800/1200/1600 DPI), freely to satisfy daily work. Equipped with USB-C to USB adapter, let you worry-free use of any device.

Mute Click & Comfortable Hand-feeling】Silent click Mouse with classic design with anti-fingerprint finish offers your hand maximum support and comfort. Silent button reduces 90% noises, which makes it an ideal wireless mouse for office, conference room, cafe, library, bedroom, help you concentrate on your work, study without disturbing others besides you. Ultra-thin, ergonomic design, lightweight and convenient for carrying or traveling.

Rechargeable Optical Mouse】Built-in durable rechargeable battery, it can be easily charged using the included USB cable without replacing the battery. Just 2 hours charging, you can use it about 7-15 days. Standby time is very long, energy-saving features, automatic sleep mode and wake-up mode are installed to save energy. Turn off the mouse LED light when not in use to save power.

Wide Compatibility】Well compatible with Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, and 10 / Windows Vista / Windows Vista/ Windows ME etc, Fits for desktop, laptop, PC, Macbook and other devices. Please Note: If your laptop just with type-c port, You need connect the supplied USB-C to USB adapter to your laptop and plug the USB receiver in to it.

reviews.text: This mouse fits very comfortably in my hand. To get it out of sleep mode, you just click the scrolling button. I got the pink one, and I love how streamlined it looks.

title: Unipows Wireless Mouse - 2.4G Slim Portable Computer Mouse with Nano Receiver, Less Noise Mobile Optical Mice for Notebook, PC, Laptop, Computer, Mac (Black and Grey)
description:
Enjoy freedom and efficiency when you use the Wireless Mouse. Compact design, easy to take to anywhere. Plug the nano transceiver into your computer's USB port for a reliable wireless connection without any hassle of additional wire and driver. High Movement resolution allows the mouse to track on nearly any surface. Quiet clicks make you concentrate more on your work, and don’t disturb people around.
Product features:
Wireless connectivity for reliable usage Advanced optical mouse with responsive tracking Noiseless click, soft touch  High dpi movement resolution works on most surfaces. Wireless mouse reduces workspace clutter 3-button mouse for better functionality and fast scrolling capability
Specification:
Dimensions: 1.4 x 2.6 x 4.7 inches (H x W x D)  Battery: 1 x AA battery (not included) Handedness: Ambidextrous Interface(s): USB 2.0 Wireless: Yes Warranty: 1 year Brand Compatibility: Universal Model Compatibility: PC, Laptop, Windows devices System Requirements: Windows XP, Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows 8, Windows 10, Windows 2000, Mac OS X 10.4 or later Number of Buttons: 3 Mouse Operation: Button(s) with scroll wheel Plug and Play Operation: Yes
Package include:
1 x Wireless Mouse 1 x USB nano Receiver (stored in back of the mouse)
features: Portable and Noiseless - Stow the USB receiver inside the wireless mouse when not in use. Take it to anywhere like home, office, coffee shop, etc. Responsive buttons provide soft click with less noise.

2.4GHz Stable Wireless Connection - A tiny wireless receiver (stored in back of the mouse) provides stronger anti-interference ability, faster transmission speed and more reliable connection up to 15m (49 feet), without any hassle of additional wire and driver. Just plug and play.

Enduring Quality & Power Saving - High DPI Movement resolution allows the mouse to track on nearly any surface. Rated to 5 million comfortable clicks. Turn into sleep mode in 8 minutes of inactivity for energy saving, easily activated by clicking any button. 1 AA Battery (NOT Included) is needed for this mouse.
Ergonomic Shape & Smooth Hand Feeling - Slim ergonomic design and smooth surface for an incredible user experience. Space grey perfect for office use, and can match any color device.

Wide Compatibility - Work with Windows XP, Windows Vista, Windows 7, Mac OS X 10.4 etc. NOTE: This product is connected by USB receiver, and is NOT compatible with Macbook pro or other laptops which only come with type C port.

reviews.title: Very cute.
reviews.text:
Really love this mouse. It is very cute, lightweight, easy to use and comfortable in your hands. Very easy to set up. Only issue was the back covering is a bit loose. Think it is a factory fault or something. It isn't falling off so far though, thankfully. That's is why it lost a star.

Overall I was very pleased with the product. Really looovvvve how cute it looks.

reviews.title: Perfect !
reviews.text: Bought this mouse to replace my old one . This one is super quiet . Scrolls perfect world perfect . It takes 1aa battery and that’s great ! The price was great and the mouse is well worth every penny!

reviews.title: LOVE THE COLORS
reviews.text: I USE FOR MY WORK LAPTOP AND IT WORKS GREAT. NO ISSUES AND I LOVE THE COLOR

reviews.title: Perfect!!

title: Kensington Pro Fit Mid-Size Wireless Mouse, Sapphire Blue (K72421AM)
description:
Product Description
Kensington Pro Fit Mid-Size Wireless Mouse Sapphire Blue (K72421AM)
From the Manufacturer
The Kensington Pro Fit Mid-Size Wireless Mouse provides users with clutter-free productivity for a desktop PC. And it complements mobile laptop usage for travel with a storable nano receiver. The ergonomic, right-handed design with a high-definition optical sensor offers precise and responsive control. The Pro Fit Mid-Size Wireless Mouse is built to last with a limited lifetime warranty.
features: Compact size for travel convenience clutter-free wireless technology and storable Nano receiver
Ergonomic right-handed design has scroll wheel with middle button and pointer speed quick-select
2.4 GHz wireless for long range with minimal interference
High-definition optical sensor (1750 DPI) for responsive control
Extended battery life up to 12 months
Compatible with Windows 10, Windows 8, Windows 7, Mac OS X and later
Compact size for travel convenience clutter-free wireless technology and storable Nano receiver
Note : In case of Wireless mouse, the USB receiver will be provided inside or along with the mouse
Ergonomic right-handed design has scroll wheel with middle button and pointer speed quick-select
2.4 GHz wireless for long range with minimal interference
Compatible devices: All iOS

reviews.title: Pretty good
reviews.text:
It's the best wireless mouse I have used so far, and the price was reasonable. It does have a tendency to skip around if the battery starts to get low of if it's not really close to my laptop. It does work, it fits nicely in my hand and it feels sturdy. I've had others that felt as if they would shatter if just dropped on the carpet.

Comfort - Great
Price - Fair
Battery life - Okay
Sturdiness - Good
Good product overall

reviews.title: A good one, but could be better
reviews.text:
Pros:
- light weight, convenient
- works
- batteries last a long time
- price is low
- on/off button

Cons
- pointer is a bit too sensitive
- compared to wired mouse, precision can be improved
- the little stick is easily lost

reviews.title: good mouse, great blue color
reviews.text: Very good mouse, and I ove the dark blue color, and it goes great with the new Blue Swirl mousepad that I also got from Amazon!

reviews.title: Nice mid sized mouse
reviews.text:
So far so good.
Easy to use and setup.
Fits my hand comfortably.
Just got it, will update if anything goes wrong.

reviews.title: ** Use tips ** Nice mouse....
reviews.text:
Nice mouse.... slightly large, and I have large hands. If you have small hands, I would purchase a size down.

It is simple to set up, works well (so far), and I like the wireless feature.

Tips:

My other mouse had a place to store the USB unit. This one also has a storage slot, which makes it convenient. Otherwise, you can leave the USB connector in the laptop (If it fits in your case with the device inserted...)

Be sure to turn off the device when not in use to conserve your batteries. (Sliding switch on bottom)

This mouse is Windows compatible. I run Windows 7.... works fine.

If you have a trackpad that drives you crazy, these devices are great!

Enjoy!

title: XINSHIS Wireless Mouse, 2.4G Wireless Mouse for Laptop, Ergonomic Computer Mouse Aluminum Alloy Wheel, 3 DPI Adjustment Levels, Leather Luxury Outfit. (Blue)

Unique feel when used.

Portable no noise click：Equipped with aluminum alloy wheel, the metal texture is more durable. Silent micro-buttons keep your Computer mouse quiet, whether in a quiet office, study ingress in a library or work late at night, to create a quiet and comfortable environment for you. Lightweight and portable, it's easy to fit in a backpack or pocket.

Plug and play stable transmission：Wireless mice can move freely in a range of up to 10 m to 15 m. You can easily use it without cable interference and enjoy more freedom than you think. DPI adjusts three horizontal accuracys (1000/1200/1600) to track the speed of the mouse more accurately and freely.

reviews.title: Glitches
reviews.text: I got this mouse because I left my good mouse at a friend's house, who I won't see for a month. I guess you get what you pay for because I've been working for about 2 hours and I've had to take the battery out to reset 5 times. The mouse icon just stops moving. At first I thought it happened when I was typing and went to move it again and it went to sleep, because the light went off. But it just stops mid move on a screen. It's almost better to just use the laptop track pad. I would not recommend

reviews.title: SAVE YOUR MONEY
reviews.text: .This mouse lasted maybe a week with the very light use that I gave it. The metal wheel no longer moves. I liked that it was quiet compared to my old one, but it should have lasted much longer

title: Logitech Wireless Mouse M315 - Vivid Violet
description: The feel-good, reliable mouse —that’ll make you forget the touchpad. From surfing the Web to updating your Facebook—you’ll be mousing on more surfaces thanks to Logitech Advanced Optical. No delays, dropouts or hassles. The plug-and-forget nano-receiver keeps you connected with reliable 2.4 GHz wireless. With 12 months of battery life (AA Battery included!), you don’t have to deal with the hassle of frequent battery changes.
features: Logitech Advanced Optical Tracking - Enjoy precise clicking and pointing—on surfaces other optical mice can’t handle—while navigating your favorite websites thanks to Logitech Advanced Optical Tracking.
Logitech Advanced 2.4 GHz wireless connectivity - You get the reliability of a cord with wireless convenience and freedom—fast data transmission and virtually no delays or dropouts.
1-year battery life (AA Battery included!) - You can go for a year without battery hassles. An On/Off switch and smart sleep mode extend battery life, while an indicator light eliminates surprises.
Plug-and-forget nano-receiver - So small and unobtrusive, you can plug it into a USB port and forget about it. Plus, you can say good-bye to worries about broken or lost receivers.
Compact comfort - You’ll enjoy more comfort and ease thanks to this compact mouse’s hand-friendly, contoured design with soft rubber grips and a smooth scroll wheel.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: Hard to go wrong with a Logitech mouse - at least I never have!  The color looks exactly as pictured and matches my Dell laptop multi-color hardcover nicely.  Good handling and lightweight, will see how long the battery lasts before I have to change it.

reviews.title: Great little mouse
reviews.text: I love these mice...small, easy to carry.  Only think I wish is that the receivers matched the mouse so that if you have two or three different colored ones you would know which receiver goes with which mouse!

reviews.title: Works as advertised
reviews.text: This is a wireless mouse and it works as expected.  Used it for my granddaughter's laptop, and she is very happy with it.

reviews.title: Nice mouse
reviews.text: I really like this mouse. However, I can't keep it because it is a 4.0 BT and my computer has 3.0 BT. the BT works well on my work computer but i bought the mouse for my personal computer. I had to return it. I really wish it would have worked on my personal computer.

reviews.title: Slick and Easy to Install
reviews.text: I really like this wireless mouse. It was super easy to hook up and works really well. I'm just using it for work so can't say how responsive it is for gaming. I like the feel of the mouse too, it's very slick and fits my hand comfortably.

title: LZYDD Mouse Anti-Slip Tape Elastics Refined Side Grips Sweat Resistant Pads / Anti Sweat Paste for Logitech G Pro Wireless Mouse
description: Anti-Slip tape Elastics Refined Side Grips Sweat resistant pads / anti sweat paste for Logitech G pro wireless mouse
features: Come with 1 set including 4 parts ( 2 top parts and 2 side parts)
Only Anti-Slip tape included, No mouse included

reviews.title: Amazing addition to the Logitech G Pro Wireless!
reviews.text: Great quality, precision cut pieces that fit EXACTLY in the shape of the mouse. Whoever designed the CAD for this did a great job on the measurements. Using the grip itself, also crazy how something so small makes a big difference. No more worrying about it slipping off my right thumb which I mentally couldn't handle. It's shame that Logitech didn't design the grip but this will do nicely until they do.

reviews.title: They're ok.
reviews.text:
I'm only using the side grips. (No issue with the texture of the buttons, so imo, its best to just not use them and keep the mouse as light as possible)

Its definitely an improvement over the stock plastic feel, which is too smooth for me. These add some grip, and even a bit of cushion.

Guess I was expecting a more grippy feeling. Maybe a more pronounced texture. There is definitely room for improvement for those of us with sweaty gaming hands.

I also wish the edges were tapered off at its edges rather than a hard cut, but that's a minor nitpick and not too important.

I will say with these grips, I am having trouble deciding between which mouse to use primarily... G Pro Wireless or Viper Ultimate. This is definitely something that was missing from the G Pro Wireless's design for me.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: Was expecting more of a Dbrand style sticker, but this is even better. It's super rubbery and grippy. Don't ever plan on missing a shot when you play with this!

reviews.title: It works for G305
reviews.text: I recently purchased Logitech G305, But it felt slippery. Though this product was intended for GPW, it worked well for the G305.

title: Gaming Keyboard and Mouse Combo, MageGee GK770 RGB Backlit Wired Gaming Keyboard with Multimedia Keys, Ergonomic Wrist Rest Computer Keyboard, 3200 DPI Gaming Mouse for Windows PC Gamers
features: ✅GAMING KEYBOARD & MOUSE: A standard 104 keys layout plus 10 multimedia function keys (total 114 keys), gives faster response and better tactile feedback. Accurate, comfortable, soft touch with anti-ghosting functionality. RGB backlit effect provides a unique visual experience, taking you into a pretty cool gaming atmosphere. Ergonomic wrist rest offers enough support and protection to your hands, and reduce hand fatigue caused by long-term use.

✅10 MULTIMEDIA KEYS & 25 NON-CONFLICT KEYS: 10 independent multimedia keys at the top of the keyboard makes it quick access to music player, email, computer, calculator without interrupting your game. 25 anti-ghosting keys allow you to press or hold multiple keys simultaneously, helping you win in the fierce game without being bound by speed. Adjustable rear feet and non-slip pads provide comfortable typing experience.

✅RGB LED BACKLIGHT KEYBOARD: The keyboard has RGB light settings with multiple modes (dynamic backlit or solid static light) to choose from, making it shining and sparkling in the dark, easy to find the correct keys and reduce error rate. You can adjust backlight brightness and speed according to personal preference. The backlight also can be turned off / on by pressing Fn + Page Down.

✅ADJUSTABLE DPI GAMING MOUSE: 7 colors LED breathing backlit ( blue, yellow, green, white, purple, red, cyan), 4 adjustable DPI - 600/800/1200/1600/2400/3200 to match the mouse speed instantly for different game scenarios. Advanced gaming optical sensor ensures accurate positioning and stable transmission. Pressing the DPI button for 3 seconds can turn off the mouse backlight. Contoured shape fits your hands perfectly, comfortable to use.

✅WIDE COMPATIBILITY: The USB wired keyboard and mouse combo is simple to use, just plug and play, no need for additional driver or software. Works well with Win2000, Win XP, WinME, Vista, Win7, Win8, Android, linux, Mac and other operating systems. Suitable for gaming beginners or lovers.

reviews.title: Excellent Keyboard!
reviews.text: This was a Christmas gift for my daughter and she absolutely loves everything about this keyboard. Thank you

reviews.title: Keyboard is very loud when typing!
reviews.text: The mouse is pretty standard, nothing great, but nothing bad. I brought my cute little set to work in my laptop bag so I figured it was secure. When I took the keyboard out 1 letter had popped off. No biggie, it snapped back on easily. The keyboard buttons are bit higher than I'm used to so I was typing slower and it was a bit uncomfortable after a while. I planned on switching back to my regular keyboard shortly but what escalated that switch was how loud the keyboard was while I was typing. My office is usually rather quiet plus I'm in a cubicle and a coworker asked what are you doing over there!?! He said it sounded like I was hammering the letters with a small hammer. I knew it was loud but after realizing it was bothering my coworkers I immediately put it in my bag to bring home. Haven't used it since!

reviews.title: Nice keyboard and mouse set
reviews.text: This is a great mouse and keyboard set, feels like typing on an old typewriter but more comfortable. I like the combined usb. Looks very nice, comfortable to use,

reviews.title: Amusing
reviews.text: I really like this set. They both match perfectly. The keyboard is comfortable and all the buttons work perfectly. I like the round buttons they are pretty cool. Connects easy enough. Just wish it was rechargeable.

reviews.title: Plug and Play Wireless Keyboard; Not sure about the mouse
reviews.text: I run Windows 10 on my laptop, and this wireless keyboard was up and running in few minutes after unpackaging.  You will need to provide your own batteries (2 AA – one for the mouse and one for the keyboard).  The keys are not tactile like other “typewriter” keyboard I have, but the keys have enough tension in the loaded spring to give a slight “satisfactory” feel to the keystrokes.  The wireless connection between the receiver and the keyboard/mouse was responsive and experienced no noticeable delay.  I am not 100% sold on the “milk tea” colored keyboard, but it slowly grew on me after a few days of use, although my 8-year young daughter thought it was like a puke color… an interesting observation.  The mouse was not for me.  It was too flat and too small for my hand, and after a few hours of cumbersome use, I switched back to my existing mouse pad.  For less than $49 USD, I think this keyboard brings a fun look to the otherwise a boring office environment.
